name: python3-jedi
title: python3-jedi
description:
autocompletion tool for Python 3
Jedi is an autocompletion tool for Python. It works. With and without syntax
errors. Sometimes it sucks, but that's normal in dynamic languages. But it
sucks less than other tools. It understands almost all of the basic Python
syntax elements including many builtins.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-jedi because autocompletion tool for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-jedi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-jedi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-jedi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
